title: Front Office Manager - Dineout Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Dineout Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Dineout Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dineout Capital India:
Dineout Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout Capital India!
